items.raw_excerpt: A food delivery worker, Sunilkumar, 46, was killed in Kochi when a bus collided with his bike.
items.summary_en: A 46-year-old food delivery worker named Sunilkumar was killed in Kochi when a bus hit his bike. The accident happened while he was working.
items.summary_ko: 46세 배달 노동자 수닐쿠마르가 코치에서 버스와 오토바이 충돌로 목숨을 잃었다. 사고는 배달 중 발생했다.
items.title_en: Delivery worker killed in Kochi road accident
items.title_ko: 코치에서 오토바이 배달원, 버스 충돌로 사망
items.title_original: Delivery worker killed after bus hits bike in Kochi

items.raw_excerpt: Sixteen buildings are up for lease in a "rare" opportunity to shape the future of a tiny community of 110 people on the NSW Central Tablelands.
items.summary_en: Sixteen buildings in Hill End, a tiny village of 110 people on the NSW Central Tablelands, are available for lease. The buildings include a former morgue, pub, and mine. Officials hope the opportunity will bring new life to the historic gold mining community.
items.summary_ko: NSW 중앙 고원에 위치한 인구 110명의 작은 마을 힐엔드에서 건물 16동이 임대된다. 건물에는 옛 Morgue, 술집, 광산이 포함된다. 관계자들은 이번 기회로 역사적인 금광 마을에 새로운 활기가 깃들기를 바라고 있다.
items.title_en: Historic mining village offers 16 buildings for lease
items.title_ko: 호주 시골 마을, 건물 16동 임대 기회
items.title_original: Morgue, pub and mine for lease as village ponders return to golden days

items.raw_excerpt: CPI demands a social audit of Kochi Corporation's governance amid concerns over ineffective pre-monsoon works and public health issues.
items.summary_en: India's CPI party wants an outside check on Kochi Corporation's work. It says pre-monsoon preparations and public health efforts have not been effective.
items.summary_ko: 인도 공산당(CPI)이 코치 시 공사의 업무에 대한 외부 감사를 요구했다. 장마 전 사전 준비와 공공 보건 대책이 제대로 이뤄지지 않고 있다고 지적했다.
items.title_en: Party demands social audit of Kochi city government
items.title_ko: 코치 시정부에 사회 감사 요구한 야당
items.title_original: CPI calls for social auditof Kochi Corpn.’s functioning

items.raw_excerpt: Internationally known modern art sculptor and Taos resident Peter Chinni, 90, has died. Chinni reportedly fell Monday evening (Feb. 4) while practicing the first rehearsal of the Taos Community Chorus
items.summary_en: Modern art sculptor Peter Chinni, a longtime Taos resident, died at age 90. He fell Monday evening while practicing with the Taos Community Chorus.
items.summary_ko: 현대 조각가이자 타오스에 오래 거주한 피터 치니가 90세로 세상을 떠났다. 그는 월요일 저녁 타오스 커뮤니티 합창단 연습 중 넘어지는 사고를 당했다.
items.title_en: Taos artist Peter Chinni dies at 90 after fall during chorus rehearsal
items.title_ko: 타오스 지역 예술가 피터 치니, 90세로 별세
items.title_original: Taos artist Peter Chinni dies - The Taos News

items.raw_excerpt: Sargassum has long been a seasonal distraction for those like writer Bel Woodhouse who live in Cozumel. But each year now there's more of it.
items.summary_en: Sargassum has always been a seasonal problem for people living in Cozumel. But now the seaweed keeps getting worse every year, changing life on the island.
items.summary_ko: 사르가섬 해조류는 코수멜 주민들에게 늘 계절 성가신 존재였다. 하지만 해마다 그 양이 늘어나면서 섬의 일상이 바뀌고 있다.
items.title_en: Sargassum seaweed is taking over beaches in Cozumel
items.title_original: How sargassum is changing the face of paradise in Cozumel

items.raw_excerpt: The Singapore restaurant’s new menu draws on wild kangaroo, coral trout, native botanicals and bush foods as Wilson reconnects with the ingredients of his home country.
items.summary_en: The Singapore restaurant Marguerite has launched a new menu featuring wild kangaroo, coral trout, and native Australian botanicals. Chef Michael Wilson uses these ingredients to reconnect with the food of his home country.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 레스토랑 마거리트가 캥거루, 산호 송어, 호주 토종 식물을 활용한 새 메뉴를 선보였다. 셰프 마이클 윌슨은 이 재료를 통해 고국 호주의 맛을 재발견한다.
items.title_en: Chef Michael Wilson puts Australian produce at center of Michelin-starred Marguerite menu
items.title_ko: 미슐랭 스타 마거리트, 셰프 마이클 윌슨의 호주 식재료 메뉴
items.title_original: At Michelin-starred Marguerite, chef Michael Wilson is putting Australian produce centre stage

items.raw_excerpt: Bloomfield in Canada's Prince Edward County is a tiny storybook village packed with unique art shops, boutiques, cozy cafés, and gorgeous nature all around.
items.summary_en: Bloomfield in Canada's Prince Edward County is a tiny storybook village. It has unique art shops, boutiques, and cozy cafes. The village is surrounded by gorgeous nature and is perfect for a relaxing getaway.
items.summary_ko: 블룸필드는 캐나다 프린스에드워드카운티에 위치한 작은 동화 같은 마을입니다. 독특한 예술 상점, 부티크, 아늑한 카페가 있습니다. 마을은 아름다운 자연으로 둘러싸여 있어 휴가를 보내기에 완벽합니다.
items.title_en: Bloomfield Village In Canada Is A Charming Walkable Escape
items.title_ko: 캐나다 블룸필드 마을은 매력적인 도보 여행지
items.title_original: Canada's Underrated Lake Ontario Village Is A Charming And Walkable Escape With Shops, Tasty Eats, And Art - islands.com

items.raw_excerpt: Takito Oda of Japan, left, and Takuya Miki of Japan shake hands at the end of their second round men's wheelchair singles match at the Wimbledon Tennis Championships in London on Thursday. Oda won the match.
items.summary_en: Takito Oda defeated Takuya Miki in the second round of men's wheelchair singles at Wimbledon in London. It was an all-Japanese match at the famous tennis tournament.
items.summary_ko: 오다 타키토가 미키 타쿠야를 꺾고 윔블던 남자 휠체어 단식 2회전에서 승리했습니다. 세계적인 테니스 대회인 윔블던에서 일본 선수들 간의 경기가 펼쳐졌습니다.
items.title_en: Japanese players face off in Wimbledon wheelchair singles
items.title_ko: 윔블던 휠체어 단식, 일본 선수끼리 맞대결

items.raw_excerpt: A historic portrait of French explorer Samuel de Champlain has found a new home at the Samuel de Champlain History Center in Champlain, New York.
items.summary_en: A historic portrait of French explorer Samuel de Champlain has arrived at the Samuel de Champlain History Center in Champlain, New York. The local museum now houses the important artwork. Visitors can view the portrait at its new location.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스 탐험가 사뮈엘 드 샹플랭의 역사적 초상화가 뉴욕주 샹플랭에 위치한 샹플랭 역사 센터에 도착했습니다. 지역 박물관이 중요한 작품을 소장하게 되었습니다. 방문객들은 새로운 위치에서 초상화를 감상할 수 있습니다.
items.title_en: Historic portrait of Samuel de Champlain finds new home at local museum
items.title_ko: 사뮈엘 드 샹플랭의 역사적 초상화, 지역 박물관에 새로운 보금자리
items.title_original: Historic Samuel de Champlain portrait finds new home at local museum - WCAX
